name: registry_set_add_load_service_in_safe_mode
raw_query: any where ((registry.path like~ ("*\\Control\\SafeBoot\\Minimal\\*", "*\\Control\\SafeBoot\\Network\\*")) and registry.path:"*\\(Default)" and winlog.event_data.Details:"Service") and (not ((process.executable:"C:\\WINDOWS\\system32\\msiexec.exe" and (registry.path like~ ("*\\Control\\SafeBoot\\Minimal\\SAVService\\(Default)", "*\\Control\\SafeBoot\\Network\\SAVService\\(Default)"))) or (process.executable:"*\\MBAMInstallerService.exe" and registry.path:"*\\MBAMService\\(Default)" and winlog.event_data.Details:"Service") or (process.executable:"C:\\Hexnode\\Hexnode Agent\\Current\\HexnodeAgent.exe" and (registry.path like~ ("*\\Control\\SafeBoot\\Minimal\\Hexnode Updater\\(Default)", "*\\Control\\SafeBoot\\Network\\Hexnode Updater\\(Default)", "*\\Control\\SafeBoot\\Minimal\\Hexnode Agent\\(Default)", "*\\Control\\SafeBoot\\Network\\Hexnode Agent\\(Default)")) and winlog.event_data.Details:"Service")))
